scripts.dev:local: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.env.local','NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_REMOTE_API=false\nNEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3001\n');console.log('🔵 Configurado para LOCAL')" && next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:remote: node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.env.local','NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_REMOTE_API=true\nNEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://ascesa.onrender.com\n');console.log('🟢 Configurado para REMOTO')" && next dev -p 3000
